summary: No-ship: the two stated fixes are present, but the mic lifecycle still has a material pending-start race.

findings.title: Push-to-talk can still leak a mic stream on re-entrant start
findings.recommendation: Guard the whole getUserMedia path with a synchronous `startingRecordingRef` or equivalent before awaiting permission, and clear it on every exit. Do not allow a second start while a permission prompt or recorder is active; otherwise the later `recorderRef`/`streamRef` overwrite leaves the first MediaRecorder/MediaStream unreachable and recording until the browser tears it down.
